briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware firm Synapse, highlighting critical risks in bank-fintech partnership models.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are set to transition to a homegrown sovereign payments network, reducing reliance on US card giants Visa and Mastercard.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is pushing credit card products into increasingly niche and unconventional territory, reshaping consumer expectations around rewards and credit.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple has acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's growing ambitions in financial data and alternative credit assessment.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's federal government declared screen scraping insecure and outlined an open banking implementation timeline, a foundational moment for Canada's consumer-directed finance journey.

- **[Leaked draft of Canada's AI strategy reportedly reveals plans for tech growth fund](https://betakit.com/leaked-draft-of-canadas-ai-strategy-reportedly-reveals-plans-for-tech-growth-fund/)** — *BetaKit* — A leaked draft of Canada's national AI strategy reportedly includes plans for a dedicated tech growth fund that could have significant implications for fintech and startup investment.

- **[BDC extends Isabelle Hudon's mandate as CEO through 2030](https://betakit.com/bdc-extends-isabelle-hudons-mandate-as-ceo-through-2030/)** — *BetaKit* — The Business Development Bank of Canada has extended CEO Isabelle Hudon's mandate through 2030, providing continuity for a key source of venture capital and growth financing for Canadian startups including fintechs.

- **[Canadian B2B software firms are falling behind in agentic AI: report](https://betakit.com/canadian-b2b-software-firms-are-falling-behind-in-agentic-ai-report/)** — *BetaKit* — A new report warns that Canadian B2B software companies are lagging in the adoption of agentic AI, a trend with direct relevance to fintech firms competing on automation and intelligence.

- **[Canada's cloud market is 'broken,' report warns](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/cloud-computing-competition-9.7219996?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — A new report warns that Canada's cloud computing market lacks competitive balance, raising concerns about cost and sovereignty for financial services firms dependent on cloud infrastructure.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis of how open banking frameworks intersect with payments competition, highly relevant as Atlantic Canadian credit unions and fintechs prepare for Canada's evolving open banking regime.

- **[Canada's Bill C-22 creates a blueprint for surveillance](https://betakit.com/canadas-bill-c-22-creates-a-blueprint-for-surveillance/)** — *BetaKit* — BetaKit examines how Canada's Bill C-22 raises significant data privacy and surveillance concerns, which intersect with open banking data-sharing frameworks and consumer financial protection debates relevant to Atlantic fintechs.
